## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] ➕ Adds a typed, annotated resource (with license + stars if a repo)
- [ ] ✏️ Sharpens an explanation / fixes an error
- [ ] 🗺️ Structural change to a stage or the README index
- [ ] 🧰 Updates `tools.md` (with official docs URL + license)
- [ ] 🧪 Updates a portfolio project brief
- [ ] 🩹 Fixes a broken link

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Every new link is **typed** (📄/📘/📰/🎬/🧑‍🏫/🛠️/💻) and **annotated** with *why it matters*
- [ ] Repos/tools note **license** (MIT/Apache/CC0/…) and approximate **stars**
- [ ] I did **not** copy content from CC-BY-NC-SA sources (e.g. kamranahmedse/developer-roadmap) — links + original commentary only
- [ ] Sections stay capped (~8 links); if I added one, I said what it replaces
- [ ] Prose stays sharp, senior, concrete, and dated **2026**
- [ ] `README.md` stays a **thin index** — depth lives in `roadmap/` files
- [ ] Link check (`lychee`) passes locally / in CI
